text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The day before the Arima Kinen,
Matikanefukukitaru visits a shrine to<n>pray.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
However, having realized that victory<n>is something
she must claim on her<n>own, she finds herself with
nothing to<n>pray for anymore.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Rather than asking for something, she<n>stands
before the gods and vows to<n>win the Arima Kinen.
